Support

Email us at support@lucidapp.co.

We reply within 24 hours.

Common questions

How do I cancel my subscription?

Go to iOS Settings → [Your Name] → Subscriptions → Lucid → Cancel Subscription. Apple handles all billing — we can't cancel it for you, but they can.

What is the Autonomy Score?

It's a number between 0 and 100 that tracks your raw cognitive performance across 5 domains: word recall, spatial reasoning, logic, creativity, and pattern recognition. It's based on your actual exercise results — accuracy, speed, quality of responses — not how many days you've used the app. Most users improve 8–12 points in their first 30 days.

I never got a notification. How do I turn them on?

Open Lucid → tap the gear icon → Enable Notifications. Or go to iOS Settings → Lucid → Notifications and turn them on there.

Is my data private?

Yes. Your exercise data is stored under a randomly generated device ID — no name, email, or account required. We don't sell data or use it for ads. See the Privacy Policy for details.

My subscription isn't showing as active. What do I do?

Open Lucid → Settings → Restore Purchases. If that doesn't work, make sure you're signed into the same Apple ID you used to purchase. Still not working? Email us.

How many exercises do I get for free?

7 exercises per day, free forever. No credit card required. The paywall appears after your 7th exercise each day. Your free count resets at midnight.

I found a bug. How do I report it?

Email support@lucidapp.co with what happened, what you expected, and your iOS version. Screenshots help.
